channel.title: LobangKing.sg — Singapore Lobangs
channel.description: Verified daily promos, freebies and discounts across Singapore.

item.title: Up to 20% off TVs + up to $700 off soundbars
item.description: Jackpot Sale storewide: up to 20% off selected TVs (free gifts worth up to $1,888), up to $700 off soundbars, plus fridge, washer and Dyson deals. Selected models, while stocks last.

item.title: Up to 55% off designer handbags, shoes & watches
item.description: Official Michael Kors sale with further reductions across designer handbags, shoes, watches and clothing — over 1,000 styles. Example: the Ava extra-small Saffiano crossbody is down from $430 to $189.

item.title: Designer leather bags on sale + free shipping
item.description: Coach Singapore's official leather bag sale — exclusive deals on handbags and signature styles, with free shipping for a limited time. New customers get 10% off their first order with code HELLO10.

item.title: Up to 50% off makeup, skincare & fragrance
item.description: Sephora's ongoing sale takes up to 50% off across makeup, skincare, fragrance and hair — including Sephora Collection (40–60% off) plus Sulwhasoo, Laneige and Caudalie. New app users get an extra 10% off their first purchase with code APP10.

item.title: Shrimp Ball Miso Soup from $2.90
item.description: New Shrimp Ball Miso Soup for a limited time — order it on its own or upgrade any regular miso soup for just $2.90. Available at all 30 Halal-certified SUKIYA outlets.

item.title: Limited-time voucher on selected tech & appliances
item.description: Limited-time online voucher on selected products (valid 22 Jun to 26 Jul), running alongside the in-store Monster-Sized Sale of 8% off your 1st item and 10% off your 2nd.

item.title: Ultimate 1-for-1 ramen & rice bowls
item.description: NDP-season Ultimate 1-for-1 on selected ramen and rice bowls — great-value Japanese comfort food via GrabFood, Foodpanda or direct ordering.

item.title: Win a Hello Kitty x Yellow Ribbon 50th plush
item.description: For its 50th Anniversary, Yellow Ribbon Singapore is giving away an exclusive Hello Kitty collectible plush. Share a thank-you story to someone who believed in you for a chance to win.

item.title: Microsoft 365 at $145 + 5% off notebooks
item.description: July notebook bundle: get Microsoft 365 for $145 with a selected notebook, plus a 5% off notebook coupon. Brands include Acer, ASUS, Lenovo and MSI.

item.title: $6.70 rice or pasta meals islandwide
item.description: Rice or pasta meals for just $6.70 each — an easy, wallet-friendly lunch or dinner at selected Kenny Rogers Roasters outlets islandwide and via online ordering.

item.title: $9.90 for 20pc Spicy Jalapeño Chicken McNuggets
item.description: Grab 20 pieces of the Spicy Jalapeño Chicken McNuggets for $9.90 with no minimum spend, running through to 8 July. Great for sharing.

item.title: Up to 50% off KOSE beauty + free gifts
item.description: Up to 50% off selected KOSE beauty brands including SEKKISEI, ONE BY KOSÉ and FASIO, plus exclusive SEKKISEI x Monchhichi gifts, foldable bags and deluxe samples with qualifying purchases.

item.title: Double 7: up to $120 off HP laptops & printers
item.description: HP's Double 7 sale: sitewide vouchers worth up to $120 off selected HP AI laptops, workstations, printers and accessories. Upgrade your tech for less while the offer lasts.

item.title: 7% + 7% off sitewide with code GET7
item.description: Pre-07.07 Sale: stack 7% + 7% off sitewide with no minimum spend (capped at $99). Some brands excluded (Apple, Dyson, Sony and more). Online only.

item.title: 10% off + gifts worth up to $106
item.description: Sothys July skincare offers: the new MultiVit range, complimentary gifts worth up to $106, limited-edition cleansing sets, anti-ageing offers and 10% off selected favourites.

item.title: Free selfie-mirror pop-up experience
item.description: A creative summer pop-up with a fun selfie-mirror personalisation activity — a simple, free, hands-on mall experience for families, shoppers and commuters.

item.title: 26th Anniversary: 1-for-1 pastries & bundle deals all July
item.description: Anniversary deals all month: buy-1-get-1 French Palmier, Buy-3-Get-1 Shio Pan, discounted Swiss rolls and multi-buy bun bundles. A free Flosss bun at VivoCity on 11 July.

item.title: Free decal + $5 voucher, no min spend
item.description: KFC Drive-Thru freebie: a free decal and a $5 voucher with no minimum spend, at islandwide Drive-Thru outlets while stocks last.

item.title: 50% off ZenyumSonic 2.0 (now $59.90)
item.description: Half price on the ZenyumSonic 2.0 smart sonic toothbrush — smarter oral care for just $59.90.

item.title: Sticky Chewy Chocolate Sundae for $6.10 with any main
item.description: SAF Day treat for NSF and NSmen PAssion members: add the popular Sticky Chewy Chocolate sundae for $6.10 with any main dish, all through July.

item.title: 10% off shavers & hair dryers + extra 5%
item.description: 10% off selected Panasonic shavers and hair dryers, with an extra 5% off when you buy more than one. Apply promo code PANASAF26 at checkout.

item.title: App coupons: value meals & deals from $1
item.description: The Burger King app is loaded with coupons from $1, value meals and combo deals through to end-July. Redeem in-store or via the app.

item.title: Up to $55 off + free next-day delivery
item.description: Online wellness sale (2–8 July): tiered savings of up to $55 off, plus free next-day delivery on orders above $150. Good time to restock tonics and supplements.

item.title: OPPO Find X9s launch: $100 cashback + $400 in offers
item.description: Launch offer on the new OPPO Find X9s: $100 instant cashback, over $400 worth of launch gifts, and 20% off selected OPPO IoT accessories through July.

item.title: 10% off weekday drives
item.description: Car-sharing on the cheap: 10% off weekday drives all July. Handy for ferrying home your sale hauls without paying peak rates.

item.title: 8% off selected hotels with UOB cards
item.description: Save 8% on selected hotel stays worldwide when you book on Expedia and pay with a UOB card. Long-running offer valid until the end of the year.

item.title: Up to 10% off flights with Mastercard
item.description: Qatar Airways is giving Mastercard holders up to 10% off flights when booking through the promo page. Valid until the end of December.

item.title: SGD fixed deposit up to 1.50% p.a.
item.description: CIMB's promotional SGD fixed deposit pays up to 1.50% p.a., with the 6-month rate nudged up from 1 July. Worth comparing if you're parking cash.

item.title: Moving-out sale + free $10 voucher
item.description: GOLDLION's moving-out sale pairs a Spend-More-Save-More deal with a $10 cash voucher (no minimum spend) — quality menswear, leather goods and accessories before the store closes.

item.title: 30% off storewide — closing after 15 years
item.description: Moley Apparels bids farewell to its very first HarbourFront Centre store after 15 years — 30% off storewide during the moving-out sale before the doors close for good.
